name: The Boom-Bap Vamp
vibe: The foundation of classic 90s hip hop. Deeply loopable.

name: Phrygian Menace
vibe: Ominous and aggressive. The 'dark' sound of DnB and Neurofunk.

name: The Soul Sample
vibe: Dusty, jazzy, and sophisticated. Great for boom-bap.

name: The Drill Menace
vibe: Minimal, heavy, and cold. Perfect for modern drill or dark trap.
